commit.message:
feat: background compilation + allocation fast paths (closes #316)

- Add background compilation thread pool with priority job queue
  (Turbofan > Maglev > Baseline, FIFO within same tier)
- Add CompileJob, CompilationQueue, CompilationPool, AtomicCodeSlot
- Add thread-local allocation buffers (TLABs) with 32KB blocks
- Bump allocation fast path: 1 add + 1 compare + 1 store
- Slow path refills TLAB block on exhaustion

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: Remove accidental override of OEGlobalsBag::getString (#11008)

`OEGlobalsBag` extends Symfony's `ParameterBag`, which already provides
a `getString` implementation. The custom override was redundant and
undesirable — subclasses should not shadow parent methods without good
reason.

## Changes

- **`src/Core/OEGlobalsBag.php`**: Removed the `getString` override; the
parent `ParameterBag::getString` is now used directly.

<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> 
> ----
> 
> *This section details on the original issue you should resolve*
> 
> <issue_title>Remove accidental override of
OEGlobalsBag::getString</issue_title>
> <issue_description>> @craigrallen I missed this. Please remove it –
OEGlobalsBag is a subclass of Symfony ParameterBag, which already
implements getString, and many other getters. We do not want to override
that.
> 
> _Originally posted by @kojiromike in
[#11002](https://github.com/openemr/openemr/pull/11002/changes#r2895993522)_</issue_description>

commit.message:
feat: Full User CRUD with Multi-tenant Isolation & Domain Events (#18)

* feat: implement full User CRUD with multi-tenant isolation (#17)

- Add FindUsersUseCase for listing and finding users by ID
- Extend FindUserPort with findAll() method
- Implement findAll() in UserPersistenceAdapter
- Extend UserController with GET /api/v1/users (list), GET /api/v1/users/{id},
  PUT /api/v1/users/{id} (update), DELETE /api/v1/users/{id}
- Add UpdateUserRequest DTO for partial updates
- Add FindUsersUseCaseTest (unit tests with mocked ports)
- Extend UserControllerTest with full CRUD + cross-tenant isolation tests

Domain events (UserUpdatedEvent, UserDeletedEvent) and use cases
(UpdateUserUseCase, DeleteUserUseCase) were already implemented.

Closes #17

* fix: cross-tenant guard throws 500 instead of 404, missing import, untested defense path (#19)

* Initial plan

* fix: address review findings - cross-tenant 404, import cleanup, and new tests

Co-authored-by: pidabrow <1809859+pidabrow@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: pidabrow <1809859+pidabrow@users.noreply.github.com>

* test: add FindUsersIntegrationTest for multi-tenant findAll isolation

Adds integration test with real PostgreSQL (Testcontainers) proving that
findAll() returns only users belonging to the active tenant context.

Scenarios:
- 3 users across 2 tenants → findAll() returns 2 for tenant A, 1 for tenant B
- findById() returns 404 when user belongs to another tenant
- findById() succeeds for same-tenant user
- Empty list when tenant has no users but other tenant does

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: pidabrow <1809859+pidabrow@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add H116-H127 heuristics (ICC Technical Secretary feedback)

12 new heuristics addressing all gaps identified in ICC Technical
Secretary / Profile Assessment Working Group feedback document:

H116: cprt/desc encoding per profile version (v2: text, v4: mluc)
H117: Tag-type-per-signature validation (26-entry allowed-type table)
H118: Calculator computation cost estimate (FLOP estimation)
H119: Round-trip ΔE measurement (AToB→BToA CLUT sampling)
H120: Curve invertibility assessment (binary search inverse)
H121: Characterization data round-trip capability
H122: Deep tag encoding validation (XYZ ranges, measurement, chromaticity)
H123: Non-required tag classification per profile class
H124: Version-tag correspondence (v2/v4/v5 tag constraints)
H125: Overall transform smoothness (adjacent CLUT node distances)
H126: Private tag malware content scan (PE/ELF/MachO/script signatures)
H127: Private tag registry lookup (Adobe/Apple/Microsoft known tags)

Tested: 424 profiles × -a mode, 0 ASAN failures, 0 analyzer UBSAN.
All UBSAN in upstream iccDEV only (IccCAM.cpp, IccProfile.cpp, IccTagLut.cpp).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: use entry-point discovery for plugins instead of hardcoded imports

register_optional_plugins now reads from rivet.plugins entry point
group via importlib.metadata, making plugin discovery automatic for
any installed plugin wheel. Missing optional plugins are gracefully
skipped at DEBUG log level.

commit.message:
Scanner refresh for CLI v0.0.422: new events, tool formats, migrate command (#64)

* Scanner refresh for CLI v0.0.422: new event handlers, tool formats, migrate command

- Add session.task_complete handler (renders task summary as status block)
- Add session.shutdown handler (renders session stats: shutdown type, code changes, model metrics)
- Add 10 new ephemeral event types to skip list (permission, elicitation, user_input, external_tool, command pairs from v0.0.422 schema)
- Add pretty-format handlers for 13 new CLI tools (show_file, ask_user, skill, lsp, propose_work, list_agents, read_agent, exit_plan_mode, fetch_copilot_cli_documentation, gh-advisory-database, parallel_validation, list_bash, list_powershell)
- Add 'migrate' CLI subcommand for explicit database schema migration
- Update scanner-refresh skill with Shadow CLI research workflow (config.local.json, local git commands, session-events.schema.json analysis, showboat validation step)
- Add .gitignore pattern for machine-specific skill config files
- Add 6 new tests (task_complete, shutdown, ephemeral events skip)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Web viewer: task-complete renders in a <details> block with green accent,
  markdown-rendered content (bold, bullets, code spans, newlines)

  with blockquoted content instead of flat text

- list-style: none + ::-webkit-details-marker suppresses native arrow
- Smaller text (0.82em), border-top separator, green tinted background

commit.message:
docs: mark Symbol Versioning (Phase 7.1) as complete in ROADMAP

Symbol versioning has been fully implemented since commit 20fd837
with comprehensive support for DT_VERSYM, DT_VERNEED, and DT_VERDEF
parsing. This update aligns the ROADMAP documentation with the
actual implementation status.

Implementation details:
- VersionTable infrastructure in symbol/version.go
- ParseVersionTables() for parsing version information
- Symbol version tracking (VerIdx, VerName fields)
- LookupVersion() for versioned symbol resolution
- Integrated into loader.Load() and LoadFromDynamic()
- Comprehensive tests in symbol/version_test.go

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: plugin discovery, Plugin Hub UX redesign, MCP server picker (#101)

Three changes in this PR:

1. Plugin discovery in copilotProxy - reads ~/.copilot/config.json and
loads skills and agents from enabled plugins
2. Remove old plugin fields from settingsStore (importedSkills,
importedAgents, npmSkillPackages, etc.) - 6 fields + 15 methods removed
3. Mid-session model switching - ModelPicker switches the model live
without restarting the session

Plugin agent instructions are merged into systemMessage (not
customAgents) to guarantee they reach the model.

Test results: 738/738 integration tests passing (51 test files), 0
skipped, including 34 plugin-discovery tests and 4 live E2E plugin
tests.

---------

Co-authored-by: Stefan Broenner <stefan.broenner@microsoft.comm>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix remaining prompt registry bypasses in intent_classifier and profile_merge

intent_classifier.py had a comprehensive inline system_prompt string while
intent_classifier.md was outdated (missing INVENTORY, WORLD_BUILDING,
META_FEEDBACK, OVERRIDE_COMMAND, OP_COMMAND intents). Updated the .md with
the complete content and switched to self.get_prompt().

profile_merge.py had MERGE_ANALYSIS_PROMPT and MERGE_EXECUTION_PROMPT as
inline Python string constants. The single profile_merge.md in the registry
couldn't represent both phases. Split into profile_merge_analysis.md and
profile_merge_execution.md; replaced constants with _get_merge_analysis_prompt()
and _get_merge_execution_prompt() helpers that route through get_registry().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test(workflows): expand workflow coverage + add CI coverage gate

- Add WorkflowCoverageExpansionTests (58 new tests) covering:
  - WorkflowSemVersion: TryParse (valid/invalid), pre-release, build
    metadata, comparison operators, CaretUpperBound, TildeUpperBound
  - WorkflowVersionSelector (via SelectVersion): latest, exact, ^caret,
    ~tilde, range constraints (>=, <), empty collection, all-deprecated
  - WorkflowVersioning.DetectBreakingChanges: no change, removed step,
    kind change, target change, condition change
  - WorkflowMatcher: exact name (score=1.0), tag overlap, no match,
    empty catalog, empty tags
  - TagWorkflowMatcher: best tag score wins, whitespace tags filtered
  - FileWorkflowCatalog: save/get round-trip, timestamp, list, get

    delete specific, delete all, breaking change enforcement, not-found

  - Fails if no test files were also changed
  - Allows bypass via 'coverage-override' PR label
  - Generates Cobertura report via ReportGenerator

commit.message:
fix: use curl -T for streaming upload instead of --data-binary

--data-binary (even with @-/stdin) buffers the full payload in memory
before sending, causing OOM on large images.

-T (--upload-file) streams the file directly using the on-disk file
size for Content-Length, avoiding any in-memory buffering.
Combined with -X POST to keep the HTTP method correct.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: remove config bloat — dashboard/tunnel always on, use flags to disable

Remove three config fields that are now redundant:
- dashboard.enabled: always true, use --no-dashboard to disable
- dashboard.auto_start_tunnel: always true, use --no-tunnel to disable
- dashboard.tunnel_allow_emails: was dead code (logged but never
  applied ACLs)

These are now runtime-only fields (json:"-") set by DefaultConfig
and overridden by CLI flags. The config file is simpler — only real
user settings remain.

Also:
- Flip env var propagation from opt-in (OTTO_DASHBOARD=1) to
  opt-out (OTTO_NO_DASHBOARD=1) matching the new defaults
- Preserve runtime-only fields across config merge round-trips
- Update README config reference table

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: stream image upload via stdin to avoid curl OOM on large files

--data-binary @file loads the entire file into memory before sending,
which fails with 'out of memory' for large images (1.2G+).

Fix: use --data-binary @- and redirect the file via stdin, which makes
curl stream the data without buffering the whole file in memory.

Applied to both harvester-vm.sh (_do_upload) and image/main.tf (terraform_data).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: dashboard and tunnel enabled by default, replace --dashboard-only with --no-pr-monitoring

Simplify the startup model: dashboard and tunnel are on by default
with an empty config. Users opt out with --no-dashboard, --no-tunnel,
or --no-pr-monitoring instead of opting in.

Changes:
- DefaultConfig: dashboard.enabled=true, auto_start_tunnel=true
- Remove --dashboard-only flag, add --no-pr-monitoring
- Simplify CLI auto-enable logic (just read config booleans)
- Add NoPRMonitoring field to ServerConfig (runtime-only, json:"-")
- Gate RunMonitorLoop on NoPRMonitoring flag
- Update README command reference and config defaults

commit.message:
Add critical unit tests for Tier 1 and Tier 2 targets

- ErrorHandlerTests (10): Exit code mapping for all exception types,
  success path, OrasUsageException vs OrasException catch ordering
- DockerConfigStoreTests (18): Load/save round-trip, missing/corrupt
  config, base64 credential encoding, credential lookup priority,
  registry aggregation with deduplication
- NativeCredentialHelperTests (6): Helper name prefixing, graceful
  failure on missing helper binary, cancellation token handling
- CredentialServiceTests (6): Delegation to DockerConfigStore,
  credential round-trip, best-effort removal behavior
- TuiCacheTests (13): Set/get, TTL expiration, pattern invalidation
  (case insensitive), clear, custom default TTL, type generics
- Fix pre-existing build error: comment out TargetOptions test
  (class was removed from source)

Total: 54 new tests, all passing (53 new + 1 pre-existing fix)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: restore live WorkIQ MCP with cache fallback

WorkIQ MCP now works (transient M365 issue resolved). Flow:
1. Live WorkIQ query (on every page load/refresh)
2. File cache fallback (data/cache.json) if WorkIQ unavailable
3. Demo data as last resort

Panels load sequentially, each querying M365 in real-time.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

then replace with the final assistant.message content only. Deltas,
user message echoes, and reasoning events no longer flash through the
conversation — they remain visible in the activity drawer.

commit.message:
refactor: extract shared utilities, remove dead code, standardize patterns

- Extract ReferenceHelper with NormalizeRegistry, ParseReference, ExtractTag, ExtractDigest
- Extract FormatHelper.FormatSize shared across BackupCommand, ManifestInspector, ProgressRenderer
- Remove dead code: CommonOptions.GetValues, TargetOptions.cs, parameterless exception ctors
- Clean TrimmerRoots.xml: remove unused Spectre.Console.Json reference
- Fix RemoteOptions: --header and --resolve now accept string[] for multi-value support
- Standardize concurrency defaults to 3 in CopyCommand, BackupCommand, RestoreCommand
- Remove misleading CamelCase naming policy from CredentialJsonContext

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(mobile): add useBarcodeLookup hook with tests

Implements barcode-to-product lookup hook for stock counting and
tagging screens. Connects BarcodeService to React state with:
- Scanner open/close state management
- Product lookup by scanned barcode value
- Scan history tracking with configurable max size
- Callbacks for found/not-found products
- Invalid barcode error handling

9 unit tests covering all hook behaviors.

Tasks: month-end-stock 5.2, 13.5; tags-categorization 11.5, 25.8

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: archetype cards show full framed images — landscape aspect ratio + BoxFit.contain

Images are 512x341 (landscape 1.5:1). Cards were portrait (childAspectRatio 0.78)
with BoxFit.cover, heavily cropping the decorative frame. Fixed:
- childAspectRatio 0.78 -> 1.4 in 2-col grid
- BoxFit.cover -> BoxFit.contain on both grid and horizontal-list cards
- Dark (#1A0A2E) background behind each image so letterbox blends with app theme

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Change default Azure region to westeurope

Static Web Apps only supports a limited set of regions and eastus
is not one of them. westeurope is the closest supported option.

commit.message:
fix: plugin wheels were empty — fix hatch build source mapping

The plugin pyproject.toml files used packages=["rivet_X"] which
expects a nested subdirectory, but the .py files live at the package
root. Changed to packages=["."] with sources mapping so hatch
correctly packages the module code into the wheel.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
